trivia: The Intercontinental version of the aircraft that started the jet age for the masses. Civil examples are essentially gone; what remains are memories, museums and a handful of special-purpose airframes.
A genuine 707 catch today would be a once-a-decade event for most stations, the definition of a heritage identity.
funFacts: Stretched and re-winged for true transatlantic nonstops.
Its airframe spawned military types that outlived it by decades.
